positive: A minimalist abstract geometric pattern featuring interlocking shapes and optical illusions. Use a limited, harmonious color palette of dusty rose, terracotta, and deep navy blue. The composition should be clean, modern, and symmetrical, perfect for textile design, vector art style, flat design, seamless pattern.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealistic, messy, organic shapes
